name: Raven Brown (PJO OC)
description:
Story: Raven was raised in a abusive household, she still had a bunch of injuries from the past harm. Anyways one school day she was attacked by a sudden Cyclops who was disguised as a Teacher but got saved by Percy, who escaped with her to camp half blood where she stayed in Cabin 11 since she wasn't claimed. but one normal day turned into a disaster, someone summoned bunch of monsters to attack the camp. So in her sudden defense she strikes them powerfully with thunder in the sky (Aerokinesis). Then got claimed by Hera after (took months to get claimed. )

she's now around sixteen or fifthteen since she came, around the same age as Percy. And also has pathokinesis, Aerokinesis, bonds with peacocks, cows and lions, can make couples love each other more, since Hera is the goddess of marriage.stronger than all demigods expect for the big three demigods and very capable fighters since Hera beat Artemis with two blows. born by Hera planting her in a lotus flower and she was born as a baby, meaning she was a half blood. Later in the future, Raven becomes a hunter of Lady Artemis. But like always, she gets killed in the end in the battle from Kronos/Luke

You you know, she's still alive right now :D
creator: SugerLegend
